list.name: Bylines archive
list.what: Self-hosted archive of 484 published pieces across PRWeek, IBM, Realeyes, UST, DMN, Econsultancy, and others. Wayback-recovered where original URLs 404.

list.name: Disambiguation press kit
list.what: Dedicated press kit at /about/keith-obrien with ProfilePage + FAQPage schema and a 13-question voice-search FAQ. Solves the wrong-Keith problem in LLM retrieval.

list.name: Rich entity schema
list.what: Person schema with disambiguatingDescription, alumniOf, hasOccupation, 25 knowsAbout topics, and a sameAs chain spanning every major external profile. Every list page is a CollectionPage.

list.name: AI-readable surface
list.what: Shipped llms.txt and llms-full.txt so answer engines and AI agents can cite the work accurately. robots.txt explicitly allows 20 LLM crawlers.

list.name: Personal hub rebuild
list.what: Rewrote keithrobrien.com in the Total Emphasis design system on Next.js 16.
